title: RNA-FUS MD simulation ensembles
author: Pavlina Pokorna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Amber parm files MD simulation  S  ensembles in .xtc format. Water molecules are stripped and only each one ns is stored. Data from Pokorna et al.: Conformational Heterogeneity of RNA Stem-Loop Hairpins Bound to FUS RNA Recognition Motif with Disordered RGG Tail Revealed by Unbiased Molecular Dynamics Simulations, 2022.
